title: Train-ticket pilot corpus (cross-app feasibility)
description: Pilot corpus for the train-ticket app. Sized to validate the trainticket scaffolding (apply-trainticket.ps1, alloy namespace allowlist, triage labels) end-to-end before committing to a full multi-day collection. About 1 VM-day at e2-standard-16.

collection_strategy.why_batch_collection: Control runs first anchor the false-positive distribution. Compact-a and compact-b alternate so an early-termination still gives balanced family coverage.

plans.purpose: Pure baseline runs anchoring the train-ticket false-positive distribution.

benchmark_tracks.description: Primary task: classify each telemetry window as ticket_worthy / borderline / noise on train-ticket.
Train on Online Boutique v4-large, test on train-ticket pilot WITHOUT retraining. The headline cross-app generalization number.

promotion_gates.raw_runs: Every collected run must pass validate-dataset-run.ps1 with 0 errors.
promotion_gates.derived_outputs: Every run's triage_examples.jsonl populates non-zero log/trace counts for active_fault windows.
promotion_gates.aggregate_outputs: Global triage dataset includes >= 6 train-ticket scenario families across runs.
